name: Banh Mi Nhu Y

name: Phi Nhung
notes: They have a robot that delivers food to your table! We aren't really fans of the BBQ Pork sub. None of their subs come with jalapeños.
recommended: Satay Beef & Egg Vietnamese Sub (fried egg)
Green Onion Cake (not listed on the main menu!)
